command: docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -c 'CREATE DATABASE vector_memory;' 2>&1; docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c 'CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;' 2>&1; docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c 'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS embeddings (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, content TEXT NOT NULL, embedding vector(1536), layer TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '"'"'general'"'"', metadata JSONB DEFAULT '"'"'{}'"'"', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());' 2>&1; docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c 'CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_embeddings_cosine ON embeddings USING ivfflat (embedding vector_cosine_ops) WITH (lists = 50);' 2>&1; docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c 'CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_embeddings_layer ON embeddings (layer);' 2>&1; docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c 'CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_embeddings_created ON embeddings (created_at);' 2>&1; docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c '\dt' 2>&1; docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c "SELECT extversion FROM pg_extension WHERE extname='vector';" 2>&1; echo 'SETUP DONE'
intent: Создание БД vector_memory с пользователем n8n, таблица embeddings + индексы
